ItacPersonItem.Notes: Cappelli was raised in the household of Alessandro Beccaria and Lucrezia Martinengo, her aunt. See Dizionario biografico delle donne lombarde: 568-1968, ed. Rachele Farina (Milan: Baldini & Castoldi, 1995), 265.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
